Name: EquipParamBooster
Description: Determines the parameters of booster parts.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The menu icon texture ID.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID for this part. Also determines the menu preview icon.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: 7 digits is the limit for s32 as the reinforcement level is taken into account in the program

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: Weight of the part.

Fields.Name: Energy Capacity
Fields.Description: The energy capacity of this booster.

Fields.Name: Energy Output
Fields.Description: The energy recovery rate. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The consumption rate of energy. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum speed for ground boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Start Acceleration
Fields.Description: Starting acceleration for ground boost. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Maximum Acceleration
Fields.Description: Maximum acceleration for ground boost. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Start Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Start acceleration duration for ground boost. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Start to Maximum Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Time from acceleration at start of ground boost to maximum acceleration. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The energy consumption for ground boost. Point per second.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Maximum Horizontal Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal speed for aerial boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Horizontal Start Acceleration
Fields.Description: Starting horizontal acceleration for aerial boost. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Horizontal Maximum Acceleration
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal acceleration for aerial boost. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Start Horizontal Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Start horizontal acceleration duration for aerial boost. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Start to Maximum Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Time from acceleration at start of aerial boost to maximum acceleration. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The energy consumption for aerial boost. Point per second.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The energy consumption for vertical boost. Point per second.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: The energy consumption for quick boost.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed during quick boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: The duration for quick boost acceleration. 1 / 30 seconds.

Fields.Name: Ground Boost: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed during ground boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed during aerial boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Initial Speed
Fields.Description: Additional initial velocity for quick boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Vertical Aerial Boost: Acceleration
Fields.Description: Vertical aerial boost acceleration. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Vertical Aerial Boost: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Vertical aerial boost maximum speed. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Vertical Aerial Boost: Start Acceleration on Jump
Fields.Description: Vertical aerial boost acceleration on jump. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Vertical Aerial Boost: Energy Consumption on Jump
Fields.Description: Vertical aerial boost energy consumption on jump.

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: Price to sell the item for.

Fields.Name: Sale Value
Fields.Description: Price the item is on sale for.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Reload Time
Fields.Description: Duration between quick boosts. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Maximum Descent Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum descent speed during an aerial boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Maximum Descent Speed on Jump
Fields.Description: The maximum descent speed during an aerial boost after jump input. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Energy Recovery Delay (when Empty)
Fields.Description: The duration to wait for energy recovery (when energy is empty).

Fields.Name: Thruster Configuration Offset (for Player)
Fields.Description: For player, specify the ID of the thruster parameter (0 means no thruster).

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 0
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 1
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 2
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 3
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 4
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 5
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 6
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 7
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 8
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 9
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 10
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 11
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 12
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 13
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 14
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display - Value 15
Fields.Description: Value for menu display only.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Maximum Ascent Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum ascent speed during a vertical boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Start Acceleration
Fields.Description: Vertical boost start acceleration. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Maximum Acceleration
Fields.Description: Vertical boost max acceleration. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Start Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Duration of vertical boost start acceleration. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Start to Maximum Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Duration from start to maximum acceleration. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Maximum Horizontal Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal speed for the vertical boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Horizontal Acceleration
Fields.Description: Horizontal acceleration for the vertical boost. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Vertical Boost: Maximum Descent Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum descent speed for the vertical boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Initial Speed
Fields.Description: Initial speed of assault boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed of assault boost. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Minimum Acceleration Time
Fields.Description: Minimum acceleration time for the assault boost. In seconds. 1 / 30 seconds

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Continuous Energy Consumption Start Time
Fields.Description: Time before continuous energy consumption starts. 1 / 30 seconds.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Reload Time
Fields.Description: Duration between uses of assault boost. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Initial Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for initial assault boost.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost: Continuous Energy Consumpion
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for assault boost per tick. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Corporation Texture ID
Fields.Description: The maker icon to use for this booster.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Initial Speed
Fields.Description: Initial speed of blade attack homing. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed of blade attack homing. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Maximum Acceleration Time
Fields.Description: Maximum acceleration time for blade attack homing. 1 / 30 seconds.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Continuous Energy Consumption Start Time
Fields.Description: Time before continuous energy consumption starts. 1 / 30 seconds.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Initial Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for initial blade homing attack.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing: Continuous Energy Consumpion
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for blade homing attack per tick. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Maximum Acceleration after Jump
Fields.Description: Maximum acceleration during aerial boost after jump. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Start Acceleration Duration after Jump
Fields.Description: Start acceleration duration during aerial boost after jump. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Boost: Start to Maximum Acceleration Duration after Jump
Fields.Description: Start acceleration to maximum acceleration duration during aerial boost after jump. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Weight Performance
Fields.Description: Weight performance during quick boost.

Fields.Name: Inherited Booster ID
Fields.Description: Booster ID to inherit parameters from.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Initial Speed
Fields.Description: Initial speed of assault boost dodge. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Terminal Speed
Fields.Description: Terminal speed of assault boost dodge. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Minimum Acceleration Time
Fields.Description: Minimum acceleration time for the assault boost dodge. In seconds. 1 / 30 seconds

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Continuous Energy Consumption Start Time
Fields.Description: Time before continuous energy consumption starts. 1 / 30 seconds.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Initial Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for initial assault boost dodge.

Fields.Name: Assault Boost Dodge: Continuous Energy Consumpion
Fields.Description: Energy consumption for assault boost dodge per tick. In seconds.
